zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes of Chester於1174年出生在英國爾切斯特時，她的父親Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester28歲，母親Bertrade de Montfort19歲。她於1192年與William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1247年10月28日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾圖特波利享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes of Chester于1174年出生在英国爾切斯特时，她的父亲Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester28岁，母亲Bertrade de Montfort19岁。她于1192年与William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1247年10月28日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾圖特波利享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Chester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Chester, the county seat of Cheshire, or from any of various smaller places called with this word (as for example Little Chester in Derbyshire, Chester le Street in County Durham, or Chesters in Northumberland), which is from Old English ceaster ‘Roman fort or walled city’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’).

variants.name: Cheshire
meanings: English: habitational name for someone from the county of Cheshire in northwestern England, the name of which is early recorded as Cestrescire, from the name of the county seat, Chester , + Old English scīr ‘district, division’.

variants.name: Chesterman
meanings: English: possibly a topographic name for someone who lived by a Roman fort, Old English ceaster, or a habitational name for someone from any of the places mentioned at Chester .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes of Chester was born in 1174, in Chester, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, was 28 and her mother, Bertrade de Montfort, was 19. She married William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby in 1192. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 28 October 1247, in Tutbury, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73, and was buried in Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes of Chester est née en 1174, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Bertrade de Montfort, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby en 1192. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 octobre 1247, à Tutbury, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1192 William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Lei sposato William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby nel 1192. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 28 ottobre 1247, nel Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes of Chesterが1174年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで生まれた時，父Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chesterは28歳，母Bertrade de Montfortは19歳であった。1192年にWilliam de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1247年10月28日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアトゥトブリーで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアチャートリー カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes of Chester(이)가 1174년 영국 체실르 체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertrade de Montfort(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1192년 William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1247년 10월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 튜트버이에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 처틀리 카스틀에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby em 1192. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes of Chester родилась в 1174 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertrade de Montfort, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby в 1192 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 28 октября 1247 г. в местности тутбури, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности чартли кастл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby en 1192. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de octubre de 1247, en Tutbury, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
